_meta.do_not_edit: Regenerated by CI from the dist; edit the source substrate, not this file.

nodes.title: The "Anchor" Motion — Dropdowns, Popovers, and Tooltips
Staggered Entrance — Lists, Table Rows, Search Cards

edges.note: loading + disabled states must be announced; do not rely on color alone
must be operable with Enter and Space (button) or Enter (link)
tables use thead/tbody/scope; charts expose data tables for screen readers
status colors must have a non-color cue (icon, label, pattern)
tables and graphs must reflow or scroll horizontally; never clip
error severity must be conveyed by text + icon, not color alone
transient messages use role=status (polite) or role=alert (assertive) per severity
focus must not be stolen by toasts; persistent alerts may receive focus when actionable
respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable entrance pulse + slide
every control needs a programmatically-associated label + accessible error message
use aria-current=page on the active item; nav landmark on the container
arrow-key traversal between items; Tab moves to/from the navigation region
dialogs use role=dialog + aria-modal=true + labelled by header; tooltips use role=tooltip + aria-describedby
focus moves into the overlay on open, trapped while modal-blocking, returns to trigger on close; Escape closes dismissible overlays, outside-click closes popovers but not modals
respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable scale + slide, keep fade
spacing, radius, and focus-ring tokens for interactive surfaces
status and data-category colors
spacing, elevation, and radius tokens
severity/status colors must not rely on hue alone
spacing and motion-timing tokens
spacing, radius, and focus-ring tokens
spacing and elevation tokens
elevation, radius, and spacing tokens
hover/focus/active transitions stay within the 100-200ms band
collapsible cards/sections expand at the accordion pace
rows/cards reveal with skeleton placeholders during load
lists, tables, search-result-cards enter with staggered fades
loader-with-logo + loading-skeleton inherit the skeleton pulse cadence
severity transitions (e.g. error → success) cross-fade rather than swap
transient feedback follows the toast enter/exit timing curve
focus-ring fade-in on focus; opacity transition on disabled
dropdown triggers (account-dropdown, notification-dropdown, etc.) anchor to their button
hover/focus transitions on items stay subtle — no large translation
popover/tooltip anchor open at the trigger with origin transform
drawer-side-panel slides on axis with easing per the drawer pattern
modals fade + scale; scrim cross-fades
